title: Healthy Chocolate Chip Oatmeal Bars
description: Naturally sweetened oat flour bars with maple syrup, coconut oil, and chocolate chips — an easy gluten-free treat.

items: ⅔ cup rolled oats, gluten-free or regular

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line or grease an 8x8 pan with parchment and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, almond milk, maple syrup, melted coconut oil, vanilla extract, and coconut sugar.
Add in the oat flour, rolled oats, baking powder, and cinnamon. Mix and gently fold in the chocolate chips.
Evenly pour the batter into the lined pan and sprinkle extra chocolate chips on top.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean and the bars are golden brown.
Let cool before cutting into bars and enjoy!

notes.label: Homemade Oat Flour
notes.text: Blend rolled oats in a high-speed blender until it resembles a flour-like consistency.
Almond milk can be substituted with another nut milk or regular milk. Coconut sugar can be substituted 1:1 with light brown sugar.
